title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on major platform stability improvements that make OpsPal more reliable for daily use. The platform now automatically cleans up outdated configurations and prevents common Salesforce setup errors, while ensuring all features work consistently across different operating systems and environments.

entries.headline: Platform cleans up outdated configurations automatically
details: OpsPal now removes unused features and settings that could cause conflicts
Works consistently across Windows, Mac, and Linux environments
Includes cleanup for Salesforce quality and architecture auditing tools

entries.headline: Salesforce metadata changes work more reliably
details: Prevents field addition errors when Dynamic Forms are active on pages
Automatically assigns record types to administrators to prevent setup errors
Reduces session interruptions from routing conflicts

entries.headline: Eliminates false missing package errors at startup
